title: Tool-Augmented LLM Agents: A Comprehensive Survey
abstract: This paper provides a comprehensive survey of tool-augmented LLM agents, covering architectures, tool use paradigms, safety considerations, and future directions. We systematically review 200+ papers and organize them into a taxonomy.

title: Graph Neural Networks for Social Network Analysis
abstract: We propose a novel graph neural network architecture for social network analysis tasks including influence detection, community discovery, and link prediction. Our model outperforms baselines on six benchmark datasets.

title: PageRank Variants: From Web to Citation Networks
abstract: This survey reviews PageRank variants tailored for citation networks. We analyze the impact of time-decay, author weighting, and heterogeneous graphs on ranking performance for academic paper recommendation systems.
